title: Tighten recipe selection
summary: Keep selector rules deterministic as more section recipes compose together. Add a regression config whenever selector behavior changes.

title: Local-first user overrides
summary: Let visitors locally move roadmap cards without implying shared task updates. Use localStorage for browser-only status overrides and keep durable changes in JSON.

title: Static intelligence index
summary: Generate precomputed indexes that make static sites feel more queryable. Prototype a JSON index from recipe, artifact, and roadmap metadata.

title: Autonomous maintenance cadence
summary: Define when recurring agents may propose changes without adding notification noise. Approve a quiet schedule and escalation boundaries before automation.
